description: Investigate traffic drop. Analyze individual pieces using Dave's reporting dashboard. Focus on home page visits, branded traffic, and specific articles with changes. Report findings to Adrian.
Create refresh cadence list. Review top 20-30 articles. Analyze metrics, competitor content, stylistic elements, page health. Prepare list for Adrian to decide on refresh frequency.
Redesign blog homepage. Remove dates from thumbnails. Minimize image use. Add author profile pics. Make tags more navigable. Base design on Cloudflare blog example.
Complete quote component. Finalize design with quote, author, optional author pic & link. Prepare for retroactive markup of existing quotes.
